latin: Noctu lupi ululabant circa castellum. Dracula ad fenestram stetit et dixit: 'audi eos — liberos noctis. quam dulcem musicam faciunt!' Jonathan tremebat in sella sua.

questions.prompt: What does Dracula call the wolves?
How does Jonathan react to the wolves?

translation: At night wolves were howling around the castle. Dracula stood at the window and said: 'Listen to them — children of the night. What sweet music they make!' Jonathan was trembling in his chair.
